    "R1.4": "The agent names one prior work and articulates the delta.",
    "R1.6": "The agent improves several problem paragraphs.",
    "RX.1": "The agent flags uncertainty for one clearly out-of-reach claim (the online recalibration claim).",
    "RX.3": "The output covers most of the agreed J*(d) with one drift (the omission of a citation survey or removal of unsupported superlatives).",
    "RX.4": "No regressions; identifies harmful patterns in the original.",
    "RX.5": "Major rewrites are traced but minor edits are not."

rationale.R1.2: The agent identifies one consistency issue with a localized fix (the internal contradiction in the final paragraph).
rationale.R1.4: The agent names one prior work and articulates the delta.
rationale.R1.6: The agent improves several problem paragraphs.
rationale.RX.1: The agent flags uncertainty for one clearly out-of-reach claim (the online recalibration claim).
rationale.RX.3: The output covers most of the agreed J*(d) with one drift (the omission of a citation survey or removal of unsupported superlatives).
rationale.RX.4: No regressions; identifies harmful patterns in the original.
rationale.RX.5: Major rewrites are traced but minor edits are not.
